top_signals.title: UK investigates TikTok for alleged age-verification lapses, exposing kids to online harms
top_signals.summary: “Age checks are a cornerstone of the UK’s online safety laws,” said Ofcom’s Chief Executive, Melanie Dawes. “Too many services have no or inadequate age checks in place, which is not good enough.”
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
